interaction_summary: User requests Italian-language resume formatting for their own job service applications in Italy (March 16-18, 2026). Interaction spans minor corrections and reformatting across multiple exchanges. The user's own resume is formatted with no strategic context — no ongoing job search project, no portfolio context, no continuing thread beyond the immediate formatting request.
exclusion_rationale: A one-off resume formatting request for immediate personal use, with no evidence of an ongoing job search project, career strategy, or deliverable beyond the formatted document. Does not meet project or recurring_responsibility criteria. User is requesting a formatted output, not owning a continuing work effort. hr-020 applied: one-off formatting request is not a project.
notes: The user later requests the same formatting for two friends (b01c1:excl:002 and b01c1:excl:003), reinforcing the one-off/service nature of the interaction rather than indicating a personal career initiative.

interaction_summary: User requests Italian-language resume formatting for friend Leul Sisaye Angelo (March 16-18, 2026). The resume content is provided by the user on behalf of a third party. Minor corrections and reformatting requested.
exclusion_rationale: A one-off resume formatting request for a third-party friend. The interaction involves no user-owned deliverable, no ongoing project, and no user career strategy. The friend's resume is entirely third-party content being formatted on request. hr-020 applied: one-off request. Additional exclusion basis: third-party content — the friend's resume is not a user-authored artifact and does not reflect user ownership or responsibility.
notes: Third-party request within the same conversation as excl:001 and excl:003. Do not treat the friend's resume content as evidence of user career strategy or job search.

interaction_summary: User requests Italian-language resume formatting for friend Suleiman Ahmed Suleiman (March 16-18, 2026). The resume content is provided by the user on behalf of a second third party. Minor corrections and reformatting requested.
exclusion_rationale: A one-off resume formatting request for a second third-party friend. Same exclusion basis as excl:002: no user-owned deliverable, no ongoing project, no user career strategy, and the content is entirely third-party. hr-020 applied: one-off request.
notes: Third-party request within the same conversation as excl:001 and excl:002.

interaction_summary: Course transcript material pasted into the conversation covering Film Noir, Sci-Fi/Fantasy, and Romantic Comedy genre conventions. This material appears in the B01-003 conversation alongside the Blade Runner reflection paper and the Genre Movie Assignment. The content is external course-provided transcript or lecture material, not user-authored.
exclusion_rationale: Pasted third-party transcript or lecture material. Per hr-001: pasting third-party transcript/text with no user ownership of an ongoing effort classifies as non_project_interaction. The genre convention content is source material used in the academic assignments but is not itself a user-authored artifact or deliverable. It does not meet work-entity criteria independently.
notes: The pasted transcript material provides context for the academic assignments (CAND-B01C1-002 and CAND-B01C1-003) but is itself excluded from candidate extraction. Missing source b01c1:msi:002 includes the null-filename attachments that may be assignment rubrics or uploaded course materials.

interaction_summary: 4-segment conversation (March 9, 2026) in which the user asks for help composing a message to connect with DCA Startups & AI Walks networking event attendees. User has attended two prior walks, missed the latest one, and received the networking sheet. This is a one-time request for advice on drafting a networking message.
exclusion_rationale: A single request for help composing one networking message. The DCA Startups & AI Walks walks are background context (user has attended before) but the user has not indicated ownership of a networking initiative, ongoing job search project, or recurring responsibility. The conversation is 4 segments and contains no follow-up or continuation evidence. hr-020 applied: one-off request for advice is not a project.
notes: Prior attendance at DCA walks is noted as context but is not sufficient to elevate to a networking project or initiative without evidence of a user-owned continuing effort.

interaction_summary: 4-segment conversation (February 21, 2026) about updating Python to the latest version on a Mac using terminal/Homebrew. User follows the installation process and encounters command-not-found errors. Classic one-off technical troubleshooting request.
exclusion_rationale: A single-session request to resolve a Python/Homebrew installation error. The interaction has no deliverable, no project context, no ownership of a development effort, and no continuation evidence. 4 segments span the entire interaction. hr-020 applied: one-off technical troubleshooting request is not a project.

interaction_summary: Two-day advisory conversation (April 15-16, 2026) triggered by a bank account closure. User investigates via ChexSystems, reviews credit reports (Experian, TransUnion), and learns about credit monitoring best practices. Expansion (18 segments) confirmed: the omitted segments contain TransUnion credit report inquiry data pasted by the user (SyncB/Google, Klarna, Liberty Mutual, Upgrade, Apple Card inquiries) and follow-up questions. The conversation is entirely reactive advisory assistance.
exclusion_rationale: The user is reactive to an event (bank closure) and learning about financial monitoring tools for the first time. No project criteria met: no user-owned deliverable, no ongoing financial management initiative, no continuing thread. The credit report data is external pasted content; the follow-up questions are one-time advisory requests. Full expansion confirmed the initial classification. hr-020 applied.
notes: Full expansion confirmed: all 18 omitted segments are pasted credit report inquiry data and follow-up advisory questions. No new activities, projects, or ownership claims in later segments.

interaction_summary: 5-segment conversation (January 3, 2026) about finding a power bank for a sister's iPhone 17 Pro Max. User requests categorized options by price/use case, then iterates on format (briefer, simpler, question-only). One-off product purchasing advice request.
exclusion_rationale: A single-session product recommendation request for a family member's device. No user-owned deliverable, no project, no strategic initiative, no continuing effort. The user asks for purchasing advice and format iterations only. hr-020 applied: one-off purchasing advice is not a project.
